creator: gnikl@justmail.de
text:
(In reply to Mikael Urankar from comment #0)
The created rust 1.84 package contains rust-objcopy somewhere under rustlib. Apparently this is a copy of llvm-objcopy, in my case from llvm 19.1.5. Since that program uses libLLVM.so.19.1 the rust package does now depend on llvm 19. This is an unwanted, surpising and annoying dependency. Is rust-objcopy required for FreeBSD?

Note: my build is with PORT_LLVM set and version changed to 19. Using PORT_LLVM halves build time for me.
